mapper.select: SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName FROM user_roles ur LEFT JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName FROM user_roles ur LEFT JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, u.user_id AS user_userId, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, u.created_at AS user_createdAt, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName FROM user_roles ur LEFT JOIN users u ON ur.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
